/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/go2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/go2_interfaces/srv/detail/checkpoint_capture__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/go2_interfaces/srv/detail/mission_control__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/unitree/go/Go2Robot/ros_ws/build/go2_interfaces:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
